spending.headline: Spending averaging 85% of volatile income
spending.description: Your spend-to-income ratio has ranged from 78-95% over the last 5 months. In January, spending nearly matched income at 95% due to an income dip.

spending.headline: Emergency fund covers only 1.3 months
spending.description: Your emergency corpus of INR 12 lakh covers only 1.3 months of expenses against a recommended 6-month buffer of INR 72 lakh.

borrowing.headline: Credit score declining steadily
borrowing.description: Your credit score has dropped 12 points from 742 to 730 over the last 5 months. While still in the good range, continued decline may affect future borrowing terms.

protection.headline: Life cover exceeds recommended level
protection.description: Your current life cover of INR 2.5 crore is 125% of the recommended INR 2 crore. Your family of 4 has solid protection.

wealth.headline: Investment rate low at 5% of income
wealth.description: Despite high earnings, only 5-6% of your monthly income goes to investments. At INR 10 lakh+ monthly income, increasing investment rate to 15-20% could significantly accelerate wealth building.

tax.headline: Only 2 of 6 tax-saving avenues used
tax.description: You are currently utilizing only ELSS and NPS under New regime. Consider exploring EPF, PPF, Health Insurance Premium, and Life Insurance Premium to optimize tax savings.
